items.situation: undergraduate poster showcase open to students from all majors
items.announcement: Good morning, everyone. I'm pleased to announce that our department will host the annual Undergraduate Poster Showcase this Thursday from 1 to 4 p.m. in the Harmon Hall atrium. This year we're opening it to students from every major, not just the sciences, so anyone with a research project is welcome to present. If you'd like a spot, just email the department office by Wednesday noon to reserve your poster board. We'll provide easels, clips, and even printing help, so you don't need to bring anything but your poster. Refreshments will be served, and we hope you'll come out to support your classmates.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To invite students of all majors to present posters
options.B: To explain how to print a research poster
options.C: To announce the winners of a science competition
options.D: To discourage students from presenting this year

questions.explanation: A正确：通知的核心是宣布海报展并邀请所有专业的学生来展示研究项目。B错（too_narrow）：打印帮助只是活动提供的一个细节，不是整体目的。C错（wrong_purpose）：通知没有提到任何比赛或获奖者。D错（reversed_intent）：通知是在鼓励而非劝阻学生参加，与原意相反。

questions.stem: What must students do to reserve a poster board?

options.A: Bring their own easels and clips
options.B: Sign up on the university research website
options.C: Email the department office by Wednesday noon
options.D: Submit a completed manuscript in advance

questions.explanation: C正确：通知明确说明想要展位就在周三中午前给系办公室发邮件预约海报板。A错（wrong_detail）：易架和夹子是主办方提供的，学生无需自带。B错（related_but_not_stated）：校园网站报名听起来合理，但通知里从未提到。D错（misattributed_detail）：通知只要求带海报，没有要求提交完整论文。

items.situation: statistics department computer lab relocating from the third floor to the ground floor
items.announcement: Due to ongoing renovations in the east wing, the Statistics Department computer lab will move from the third floor to Room 108 on the ground floor, effective next Monday. All specialized software licenses have already been transferred, so your projects and saved files will remain accessible from the new machines. Please note that the third-floor space will be sealed off for wiring work through the end of the month. Because Room 108 has fewer stations than the old lab, we're asking students to reserve a two-hour block online during peak afternoon hours. Overnight access will no longer be available, so please plan your longer assignments accordingly.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain how to install statistical software
options.B: To inform students that the computer lab is relocating
options.C: To announce the permanent closure of the lab
options.D: To recruit student helpers for a wiring project

questions.explanation: B正确：通知的主旨是告知统计系机房从三楼搬到一楼108室并说明相关安排。A错（too_narrow）：软件许可已转移只是细节，且通知没讲如何安装软件。C错（reversed_intent）：机房是搬迁而非永久关闭，与原意相反。D错（wrong_purpose）：布线工程只是搬迁原因的背景，通知并未招募帮手。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about Room 108?

options.A: It offers more workstations than the old lab
options.B: It will be sealed off for wiring this month
options.C: It allows unlimited overnight study sessions
options.D: It cannot serve as many students at one time

questions.explanation: D正确：通知说108室工位比旧机房少，还要求学生在下午高峰预约两小时时段，可推断它一次容纳的学生更少。A错（wrong_detail）：与原文相反，108室工位更少而非更多。B错（misattributed_detail）：被封闭布线的是三楼空间，不是108室。C错（reversed_intent）：通知明确说不再提供通宵使用，与选项相反。

items.situation: professional wardrobe pop-up paired with a free headshot clinic
items.announcement: The Career Center is teaming up with the Alumni Association to bring you a Professional Wardrobe Pop-Up and free headshot clinic this coming Tuesday. From 10 a.m. to 3 p.m. in the Student Union ballroom, you can browse gently used business attire donated by alumni and take home up to two outfits at no cost. A professional photographer will also be on hand to shoot polished LinkedIn headshots. We recommend arriving early, since the most popular sizes tend to go quickly. There's no need to register in advance, but please bring your student ID to check in at the door.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To photograph students for a yearbook project
options.B: To sell business attire donated by alumni
options.C: To offer free professional attire and headshots
options.D: To advertise a single LinkedIn photo session

questions.explanation: C正确：通知的核心是提供免费的职业着装和免费的职业头像拍摄。A错（wrong_purpose）：拍照是为LinkedIn头像，与毕业纪念册无关。B错（reversed_intent）：服装是免费领取而非出售，与原意相反。D错（too_narrow）：头像拍摄只是活动的一半，通知同时还包含衣物领取。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker recommend arriving early?

options.A: Because the supply of popular sizes is limited
options.B: Because online registration closes at 10 a.m.
options.C: Because the photographer leaves before noon
options.D: Because ID checks create long lines at the door

questions.explanation: A正确：通知说热门尺码往往很快被拿光，可推断供给有限，所以建议早到。B错（wrong_detail）：通知明确说无需提前报名，不存在报名截止。C错（unrelated_inference）：通知没有提摄影师的离场时间，属于无依据推断。D错（over_inference）：查验学生证只是签到环节，通知未提及排长队，属过度推断。

items.situation: campus dining hall switching to a reduced summer schedule
items.announcement: Attention students and staff. Beginning Monday, May 18th, the Commons Dining Hall will switch to its reduced summer schedule. Breakfast service ends for the season, so the hall will now open at 11 a.m. for lunch and close at 7 p.m. after dinner, Monday through Friday. On weekends, only the ground-floor cafe will stay open, serving grab-and-go items from noon to 4 p.m. Meal-plan swipes will still be accepted at both locations, but your declining-balance dollars won't carry over into the fall term. If you have an early class, we suggest picking up breakfast items the evening before.

questions.stem: What change to the dining schedule is announced?

options.A: The hall will open earlier each morning for breakfast
options.B: The hall will host special summer dinner events
options.C: The cafe will serve grab-and-go items until midnight
options.D: Breakfast service will be discontinued for the season

questions.explanation: D正确：通知明确说这一季不再供应早餐，餐厅改为上午11点开门。A错（wrong_detail）：与原文相反，取消早餐后餐厅开门更晚而非更早。B错（related_but_not_stated）：夏季特别晚餐活动听着合理，但通知从未提及。C错（misattributed_detail）：小餐吧确实卖即取即走食品，但时间是中午到下午4点，不是到午夜。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who have early classes?

options.A: They will receive free breakfast vouchers
options.B: They cannot buy breakfast at the hall in the morning
options.C: They must eat only at the weekend cafe
options.D: Their declining-balance dollars will roll into fall

questions.explanation: B正确：早餐取消且餐厅上午11点才开门，加上建议前一晚先取早餐，可推断早课学生早上无法在餐厅买到早餐。A错（over_inference）：通知只建议提前取餐，从未提供免费早餐券，属过度推断。C错（unrelated_inference）：周末小餐吧的安排与工作日早课无关。D错（wrong_detail）：通知明确说余额不会带入秋季学期，与选项相反。

items.situation: information session on student health insurance enrollment and waivers
items.announcement: This is a reminder that the Student Health Office will hold an information session on health insurance enrollment next Wednesday at 4 p.m. in Room 220 of the Wellness Center. An advisor will walk you through how to enroll in or waive the university plan before the September 30th deadline. If you already have coverage through a parent or employer, you'll need to submit a waiver form to avoid being charged automatically. Please bring a copy of your current insurance card if you plan to file a waiver that day. The session is open to all students, and no sign-up is required.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To inform students about a health insurance session
options.B: To announce the opening of a new health clinic
options.C: To describe how to book a doctor's appointment
options.D: To announce that the university plan is being canceled

questions.explanation: A正确：通知的主旨是告知即将举行的健康保险信息说明会及其时间地点。B错（wrong_purpose）：通知没有提到任何新诊所开张。C错（too_narrow）：说明会讲的是保险登记与豁免，而非预约看医生。D错（reversed_intent）：学校保险计划仍在运行，学生要选择登记或豁免，并非取消，与原意相反。

questions.stem: What must students do to avoid being charged for the plan?

options.A: Attend the session in person on Wednesday
options.B: Pay the enrollment fee before September 30th
options.C: Submit a waiver form showing other coverage
options.D: Bring their insurance card to Room 220

questions.explanation: C正确：通知说已有父母或雇主保险的学生需提交豁免表，才能避免被自动收费。A错（related_but_not_stated）：说明会对所有学生开放且无需报名，出席并不能免除收费。B错（wrong_detail）：交登记费是加入学校计划的做法，恰恰会被收费，而非避免收费。D错（misattributed_detail）：带保险卡是当天办理豁免时的要求，本身并不是免收费的动作。
